name: @usejunior/safedocx-mcpb
description: Claude Desktop MCP Bundle (.mcpb) wrapper for @usejunior/safe-docx

scripts.build: npm run build -w @usejunior/docx-comparison && npm run build -w @usejunior/docx-primitives && npm run build -w @usejunior/safe-docx && node esbuild.config.mjs
scripts.pack:mcpb: npm run build && npx -y @anthropic-ai/mcpb validate . && npx -y @anthropic-ai/mcpb pack . safe-docx.mcpb
